title: Add Job Application Form Section

requirements.text: Create a new 'Apply Now' / Job Application section component (ApplicationSection.tsx) that includes a form with fields for: Full Name, Email, Phone Number, Nationality, Position Applied For (dropdown or text), Years of Experience, and a Resume/CV upload field. The form should match the existing site's visual theme (colors, typography, card styling) and be accessible from the hero section's 'Apply' button.

quotes: I need aad in applications apply

acceptanceCriteria: A new ApplicationSection component is created and rendered in App.tsx
The application form includes fields for Full Name, Email, Phone, Nationality, Position Applied For, Years of Experience, and Resume upload
Form styling is consistent with the existing site theme (colors, typography, card styles)
The 'Apply' button in HeroSection scrolls to or opens the ApplicationSection
The form has basic client-side validation (required fields, valid email format)
A success message is displayed after form submission

requirements.text: Add the ApplicationSection to the site navigation in the Header component so users can navigate directly to the application form from the main menu.

quotes: I need aad in applications apply

acceptanceCriteria: A navigation link labeled 'Apply' or 'Apply Now' appears in the Header desktop and mobile menus
Clicking the nav link smoothly scrolls to the ApplicationSection

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts) or frontend/src/main.tsx
Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui
Match existing site visual theme and Tailwind color tokens defined in tailwind.config.js and index.css
nonGoals: Backend storage or persistence of application form submissions
Email notifications or integrations upon form submission
